name: Horace Ott
abstract: Horace Ott (born April 15, 1933) is an American jazz and R&B composer, arranger, record producer, conductor and pianist. He is noted for his work since the late 1950s with a wide variety of artists, including The Shirelles, Don Covay, Nina Simone, Houston Person, and the Village People.

about_quotes.speaker: David Spinozza
about_quotes.evidence: Horace Ott started calling me to play on his sessions. So then I was doing maybe two sessions a week for Horace.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Spinozza interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, NY, September 27, 2025
